title: Classification of Data Structures
description: A hierarchical diagram showing the classification of data structures into Primitive and Non-Primitive categories, with their subcategories and common examples.
relationships: Data Structures is divided into Primitive and Non-Primitive
Primitive Data Structures include Integer, Float, Character, Boolean, Pointer
Non-Primitive Data Structures is divided into Linear and Non-Linear
Linear Data Structures include Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues
Non-Linear Data Structures include Trees, Graphs
